symptoms.symptom_name: Sudden severe unilateral pelvic pain during exercise
Absence of fever, regular cycle, low pregnancy risk

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reduces but does not eliminate the need to formally exclude pregnancy.
Absence of fever argues against an infective cause.
Consistent with ongoing traction on the twisted adnexa.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tender adnexal mass with absent Doppler flow, negative pregnancy test

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective confirmation; clinician-only findings sealed from telehealth chat.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Sudden severe unilateral pelvic pain during exercise, with vomiting and position-related worsening, together confirm likely ovarian torsion requiring emergency ultrasound and surgery.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Immediate urine/serum pregnancy test and urgent transvaginal ultrasound with Doppler in the Emergency Department
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Excludes ectopic pregnancy and confirms torsion.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent gynaecological surgical review for likely laparoscopic detorsion
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Definitive treatment to salvage ovarian viability.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Reassurance that this is period pain or a muscle strain, with home rest
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Would risk irreversible ovarian loss from delayed detorsion.
